features.name: action_toward_target_center_xy_cosine_gt_0.7
features.source:
def f1(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_cx = s[9] + 0.5 * s[17]
    target_cy = s[10] + 0.5 * s[18]
    to_target_x = target_cx - robot_x
    to_target_y = target_cy - robot_y
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    norm = (dx ** 2 + dy ** 2) ** 0.5
    to_target_norm = (to_target_x ** 2 + to_target_y ** 2) ** 0.5
    if norm == 0 or to_target_norm == 0:
        return False
    cosine = (dx * to_target_x + dy * to_target_y) / (norm * to_target_norm)
    return cosine > 0.7

features.name: action_away_from_target_center_xy_cosine_lt_-0.7
features.source:
def f2(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_cx = s[9] + 0.5 * s[17]
    target_cy = s[10] + 0.5 * s[18]
    to_target_x = target_cx - robot_x
    to_target_y = target_cy - robot_y
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    norm = (dx ** 2 + dy ** 2) ** 0.5
    to_target_norm = (to_target_x ** 2 + to_target_y ** 2) ** 0.5
    if norm == 0 or to_target_norm == 0:
        return False
    cosine = (dx * to_target_x + dy * to_target_y) / (norm * to_target_norm)
    return cosine < -0.7

features.name: action_xy_magnitude_lt_0.02_bucket_aligned
features.source:
def f3(s, a):
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    mag = (dx ** 2 + dy ** 2) ** 0.5
    return mag < 0.02

features.name: action_xy_magnitude_ge_0.02_bucket_aligned
features.source:
def f4(s, a):
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    mag = (dx ** 2 + dy ** 2) ** 0.5
    return mag >= 0.02

features.name: robot_left_of_passage0_wall_and_dx_gt_0
robot_in_passage0_zone_and_dx_gt_0
features.source:
def f6(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_r = s[3]
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_w = s[27]
    dx = a[0]
    inside = (robot_x + robot_r >= wall_x) and (robot_x < wall_x + wall_w + robot_r)
    return inside and (dx > 0)

features.name: robot_y_aligned_with_passage0_gap_and_abs_dy_lt_0.04
features.source:
def f7(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + robot_r
    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_r
    dy = a[1]
    aligned = (robot_y >= gap_lower) and (robot_y <= gap_upper)
    return aligned and (abs(dy) < 0.04)

features.name: robot_y_below_passage0_gap_and_dy_positive
robot_y_above_passage0_gap_and_dy_negative
robot_past_passage0_wall_and_action_toward_target
features.source:
def f10(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_r = s[3]
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_w = s[27]
    wall_right = wall_x + wall_w + robot_r
    target_cx = s[9] + 0.5 * s[17]
    dx = a[0]
    return (robot_x >= wall_right) and (dx > 0) and (target_cx > robot_x)

features.name: robot_close_to_target_and_action_small
features.source:
def f11(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_cx = s[9] + 0.5 * s[17]
    target_cy = s[10] + 0.5 * s[18]
    dist = ((robot_x - target_cx) ** 2 + (robot_y - target_cy) ** 2) ** 0.5
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    mag = (dx ** 2 + dy ** 2) ** 0.5
    return (dist < 0.2) and (mag < 0.04)

features.name: robot_not_inside_target_region
features.source:
def f12(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_w = s[17]
    target_h = s[18]
    inside_x = (robot_x + robot_r >= target_x) and (robot_x - robot_r <= target_x + target_w)
    inside_y = (robot_y + robot_r >= target_y) and (robot_y - robot_r <= target_y + target_h)
    return not (inside_x and inside_y)

features.name: action_dx_gt_abs_dy_and_toward_target_x
features.source:
def f13(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    target_cx = s[9] + 0.5 * s[17]
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    toward = (target_cx > robot_x and dx > 0) or (target_cx < robot_x and dx < 0)
    return (abs(dx) > abs(dy)) and toward

features.name: action_abs_dy_gt_abs_dx_and_toward_target_y
features.source:
def f14(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_cy = s[10] + 0.5 * s[18]
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    toward = (target_cy > robot_y and dy > 0) or (target_cy < robot_y and dy < 0)
    return (abs(dy) > abs(dx)) and toward

features.name: robot_left_of_target_and_dx_positive
robot_right_of_target_and_dx_negative
robot_below_target_and_dy_positive
robot_above_target_and_dy_negative
action_rotates_toward_target_theta
features.source:
def f19(s, a):
    import math
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_theta = s[2]
    target_cx = s[9] + 0.5 * s[17]
    target_cy = s[10] + 0.5 * s[18]
    dx = target_cx - robot_x
    dy = target_cy - robot_y
    angle_to_target = math.atan2(dy, dx)
    dtheta = a[2]
    angle_diff = angle_to_target - robot_theta
    while angle_diff > math.pi:
        angle_diff -= 2 * math.pi
    while angle_diff < -math.pi:
        angle_diff += 2 * math.pi
    return (angle_diff > 0 and dtheta > 0) or (angle_diff < 0 and dtheta < 0)

features.name: action_rotates_away_from_target_theta
features.source:
def f20(s, a):
    import math
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_theta = s[2]
    target_cx = s[9] + 0.5 * s[17]
    target_cy = s[10] + 0.5 * s[18]
    dx = target_cx - robot_x
    dy = target_cy - robot_y
    angle_to_target = math.atan2(dy, dx)
    dtheta = a[2]
    angle_diff = angle_to_target - robot_theta
    while angle_diff > math.pi:
        angle_diff -= 2 * math.pi
    while angle_diff < -math.pi:
        angle_diff += 2 * math.pi
    return (angle_diff > 0 and dtheta < 0) or (angle_diff < 0 and dtheta > 0)

features.name: robot_near_passage0_wall_and_dx_positive
features.source:
def f21(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_r = s[3]
    wall_x = s[19]
    dx = a[0]
    near = (abs((robot_x + robot_r) - wall_x) < 0.05)
    return near and (dx > 0)

features.name: robot_y_near_passage0_gap_center_and_abs_dy_lt_0.03
features.source:
def f22(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + robot_r
    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_r
    gap_center = 0.5 * (gap_lower + gap_upper)
    dy = a[1]
    return (abs(robot_y - gap_center) < 0.07) and (abs(dy) < 0.03)

features.name: robot_left_of_both_obstacles_and_dx_positive
features.source:
def f24(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_r = s[3]
    obst0_x = s[19]
    obst1_x = s[29]
    dx = a[0]
    return (robot_x + robot_r < obst0_x) and (robot_x + robot_r < obst1_x) and (dx > 0)

features.name: robot_between_obstacles_and_dx_positive
features.source:
def f25(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_r = s[3]
    obst0_x = s[19]
    obst1_x = s[29]
    wall_w0 = s[27]
    wall_w1 = s[37]
    left = min(obst0_x, obst1_x)
    right = max(obst0_x + wall_w0, obst1_x + wall_w1)
    dx = a[0]
    return (robot_x + robot_r >= left) and (robot_x < right) and (dx > 0)

features.name: robot_right_of_both_obstacles_and_dx_positive
features.source:
def f26(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_r = s[3]
    obst0_x = s[19]
    obst1_x = s[29]
    wall_w0 = s[27]
    wall_w1 = s[37]
    right0 = obst0_x + wall_w0
    right1 = obst1_x + wall_w1
    dx = a[0]
    return (robot_x >= right0) and (robot_x >= right1) and (dx > 0)

features.name: action_rotationally_dominant
action_translationally_dominant
robot_near_obstacle0_and_action_not_toward_obstacle0
features.source:
def f29(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    obst_x = s[19] + 0.5 * s[27]
    obst_y = s[20] + 0.5 * s[28]
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    dist = ((robot_x - obst_x) ** 2 + (robot_y - obst_y) ** 2) ** 0.5
    to_obst_x = obst_x - robot_x
    to_obst_y = obst_y - robot_y
    norm = (dx ** 2 + dy ** 2) ** 0.5
    to_obst_norm = (to_obst_x ** 2 + to_obst_y ** 2) ** 0.5
    if norm == 0 or to_obst_norm == 0:
        return False
    cosine = (dx * to_obst_x + dy * to_obst_y) / (norm * to_obst_norm)
    return (dist < 0.15) and (cosine < 0.3)

features.name: robot_y_near_passage0_gap_and_action_not_toward_obstacle0
features.source:
def f31(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + robot_r
    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_r
    gap_center = 0.5 * (gap_lower + gap_upper)
    obst_x = s[19] + 0.5 * s[27]
    obst_y = s[20] + 0.5 * s[28]
    robot_x = s[0]
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    dist_y = abs(robot_y - gap_center)
    to_obst_x = obst_x - robot_x
    to_obst_y = obst_y - robot_y
    norm = (dx ** 2 + dy ** 2) ** 0.5
    to_obst_norm = (to_obst_x ** 2 + to_obst_y ** 2) ** 0.5
    if norm == 0 or to_obst_norm == 0:
        return False
    cosine = (dx * to_obst_x + dy * to_obst_y) / (norm * to_obst_norm)
    return (dist_y < 0.07) and (cosine < 0.3)

features.name: action_is_not_zero
features.source:
def f33(s, a):
    return not ((a[0] == 0) and (a[1] == 0) and (a[2] == 0) and (a[3] == 0) and (a[4] == 0))

features.name: action_arm_or_vacuum_nonzero
features.source:
def f34(s, a):
    return (abs(a[3]) > 0.01) or (abs(a[4]) > 0.01)

features.name: robot_inside_target_and_action_small
features.source:
def f35(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_w = s[17]
    target_h = s[18]
    inside_x = (robot_x + robot_r >= target_x) and (robot_x - robot_r <= target_x + target_w)
    inside_y = (robot_y + robot_r >= target_y) and (robot_y - robot_r <= target_y + target_h)
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    mag = (dx ** 2 + dy ** 2) ** 0.5
    return (inside_x and inside_y) and (mag < 0.04)

features.name: robot_not_inside_target_and_action_toward_target
features.source:
def f36(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_w = s[17]
    target_h = s[18]
    inside_x = (robot_x + robot_r >= target_x) and (robot_x - robot_r <= target_x + target_w)
    inside_y = (robot_y + robot_r >= target_y) and (robot_y - robot_r <= target_y + target_h)
    target_cx = target_x + 0.5 * target_w
    target_cy = target_y + 0.5 * target_h
    to_target_x = target_cx - robot_x
    to_target_y = target_cy - robot_y
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    norm = (dx ** 2 + dy ** 2) ** 0.5
    to_target_norm = (to_target_x ** 2 + to_target_y ** 2) ** 0.5
    if norm == 0 or to_target_norm == 0:
        return False
    cosine = (dx * to_target_x + dy * to_target_y) / (norm * to_target_norm)
    return (not (inside_x and inside_y)) and (cosine > 0.7)

def f41(s, a):

    wall_x = s[19]

    dy = a[1]

features.name: robot_in_passage0_zone_and_action_not_toward_any_obstacle
features.source:
def f42(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_w = s[27]
    inside = (robot_x + robot_r >= wall_x) and (robot_x < wall_x + wall_w + robot_r)
    obst0_x = s[19] + 0.5 * s[27]
    obst0_y = s[20] + 0.5 * s[28]
    obst1_x = s[29] + 0.5 * s[37]
    obst1_y = s[30] + 0.5 * s[38]
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    to_obst0_x = obst0_x - robot_x
    to_obst0_y = obst0_y - robot_y
    to_obst1_x = obst1_x - robot_x
    to_obst1_y = obst1_y - robot_y
    norm = (dx ** 2 + dy ** 2) ** 0.5
    to_obst0_norm = (to_obst0_x ** 2 + to_obst0_y ** 2) ** 0.5
    to_obst1_norm = (to_obst1_x ** 2 + to_obst1_y ** 2) ** 0.5
    if norm == 0 or to_obst0_norm == 0 or to_obst1_norm == 0:
        return False
    cosine0 = (dx * to_obst0_x + dy * to_obst0_y) / (norm * to_obst0_norm)
    cosine1 = (dx * to_obst1_x + dy * to_obst1_y) / (norm * to_obst1_norm)
    return inside and (cosine0 < 0.3) and (cosine1 < 0.3)

features.name: robot_in_passage0_zone_and_action_toward_target_not_obstacles
features.source:
def f43(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_w = s[27]
    inside = (robot_x + robot_r >= wall_x) and (robot_x < wall_x + wall_w + robot_r)
    target_cx = s[9] + 0.5 * s[17]
    target_cy = s[10] + 0.5 * s[18]
    to_target_x = target_cx - robot_x
    to_target_y = target_cy - robot_y
    obst0_x = s[19] + 0.5 * s[27]
    obst0_y = s[20] + 0.5 * s[28]
    obst1_x = s[29] + 0.5 * s[37]
    obst1_y = s[30] + 0.5 * s[38]
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    norm = (dx ** 2 + dy ** 2) ** 0.5
    to_target_norm = (to_target_x ** 2 + to_target_y ** 2) ** 0.5
    to_obst0_x = obst0_x - robot_x
    to_obst0_y = obst0_y - robot_y
    to_obst1_x = obst1_x - robot_x
    to_obst1_y = obst1_y - robot_y
    to_obst0_norm = (to_obst0_x ** 2 + to_obst0_y ** 2) ** 0.5
    to_obst1_norm = (to_obst1_x ** 2 + to_obst1_y ** 2) ** 0.5
    if norm == 0 or to_target_norm == 0 or to_obst0_norm == 0 or to_obst1_norm == 0:
        return False
    cosine_target = (dx * to_target_x + dy * to_target_y) / (norm * to_target_norm)
    cosine0 = (dx * to_obst0_x + dy * to_obst0_y) / (norm * to_obst0_norm)
    cosine1 = (dx * to_obst1_x + dy * to_obst1_y) / (norm * to_obst1_norm)
    return inside and (cosine_target > 0.7) and (cosine0 < 0.3) and (cosine1 < 0.3)

features.name: robot_y_near_passage0_gap_and_dx_positive
features.source:
def f44(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + robot_r
    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_r
    gap_center = 0.5 * (gap_lower + gap_upper)
    dx = a[0]
    return (abs(robot_y - gap_center) < 0.07) and (dx > 0)

features.name: robot_left_of_passage0_wall_and_dx_not_positive
robot_in_passage0_zone_and_dx_not_positive
features.source:
def f46(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_r = s[3]
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_w = s[27]
    dx = a[0]
    inside = (robot_x + robot_r >= wall_x) and (robot_x < wall_x + wall_w + robot_r)
    return inside and (dx <= 0)

features.name: robot_past_passage0_wall_and_dx_not_positive
features.source:
def f47(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_r = s[3]
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_w = s[27]
    wall_right = wall_x + wall_w + robot_r
    dx = a[0]
    return (robot_x >= wall_right) and (dx <= 0)

features.name: robot_close_to_target_and_action_not_small_bucket_aligned
features.source:
def f48(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_cx = s[9] + 0.5 * s[17]
    target_cy = s[10] + 0.5 * s[18]
    dist = ((robot_x - target_cx) ** 2 + (robot_y - target_cy) ** 2) ** 0.5
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    mag = (dx ** 2 + dy ** 2) ** 0.5
    return (dist < 0.2) and (mag >= 0.02)

features.name: robot_far_from_target_and_action_small_bucket_aligned
features.source:

    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    mag = (dx ** 2 + dy ** 2) ** 0.5
    return (dist > 0.5) and (mag < 0.02)

features.name: action_reduces_distance_to_passage0_gap_center_in_y
features.source:
def f53(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    dy = a[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + robot_r
    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_r
    gap_center = 0.5 * (gap_lower + gap_upper)
    before = abs(robot_y - gap_center)
    after = abs((robot_y + dy) - gap_center)
    return after < before

features.name: action_increases_distance_to_passage0_gap_center_in_y

features.name: action_keeps_robot_y_inside_passage0_gap_after_step
features.source:
def f55(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    dy = a[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    next_y = robot_y + dy
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + robot_r
    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_r
    return (next_y >= gap_lower) and (next_y <= gap_upper)

def f56(s, a):

    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + robot_r
    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_r
    return (next_y < gap_lower) or (next_y > gap_upper)

    return (dx > 0) and (after < before)

features.name: robot_left_of_passage0_wall_and_action_would_enter_gap_band_after_step
features.source:
def f59(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    robot_r = s[3]
    wall_x = s[19]
    next_x = robot_x + dx
    next_y = robot_y + dy
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + robot_r
    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_r
    return (robot_x + robot_r < wall_x) and (next_x + robot_r >= wall_x) and (next_y >= gap_lower) and (next_y <= gap_upper)

def f65(s, a):

    gap_upper = s[30] - robot_r

action_small_rotation_while_translating
robot_near_passage0_and_action_small_rotation_while_moving_right
features.source:
def f75(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    dx = a[0]
    dtheta = a[2]
    robot_r = s[3]
    wall_x = s[19]
    near_wall = abs((robot_x + robot_r) - wall_x) < 0.08
    return near_wall and (dx > 0) and (abs(dtheta) < 0.05)
